notes: Palm Beach County FL — Landmark Web Official Records (live-validated 2026-05-26). Pure-HTTP adapter at src/titlepro/search/recorder/counties/adapters/landmark_adapter.py. Flow: GET landing -> POST /Search/SetDisclaimer -> GET /search/index?theme=.blue&section=searchCriteriaName -> POST /Search/NameSearch with g-recaptcha-response token. ShowCaptcha returns 'True' for every cold session so reCAPTCHA v2 IS REQUIRED on the first search (sitekey 6LdBHOorAAAAALwRLkAZpnNsfcp7qfFS4YIGIRTU). Without a 2Captcha solution the server returns HTTP 500 from NameSearch. Set CAPTCHA_API_KEY in env and allow_automated_captcha_solver:true (already set here) to auto-solve. Parcel-ID search is the recommended fallback when name search hits the result cap (Tony Roveda 2026-05-21). Test subjects: VOLLMAN+WU (102 SEGOVIA WAY, JUPITER), HABER (DANA + MARK, 21831 PALM GRASS DR, BOCA RATON).
